__package__.yml.rawContents:
types:
  WelcomePayloadType:
    enum:
      - Welcome
    inline: true
    source:
      openapi: ../asyncapi.yml
  WelcomePayload:
    properties:
      type: optional<WelcomePayloadType>
      message: optional<string>
    source:
      openapi: ../asyncapi.yml
  ErrorPayloadType:
    enum:
      - Error
    inline: true
    source:
      openapi: ../asyncapi.yml
  ErrorPayload:
    properties:
      type: optional<ErrorPayloadType>
      code: optional<integer>
    source:
      openapi: ../asyncapi.yml
  DataPayloadType:
    enum:
      - DataUpdate
      - DataRefresh
    inline: true
    source:
      openapi: ../asyncapi.yml
  DataPayload:
    properties:
      type: optional<DataPayloadType>
      payload: optional<string>
    source:
      openapi: ../asyncapi.yml
  PlainPayload:
    properties:
      content: optional<string>
    source:
      openapi: ../asyncapi.yml

channel.docs: Channel for testing discriminant value extraction

events.yml.rawContents:
channel:
  path: /v1/ws/events
  auth: false
  docs: Channel for testing discriminant value extraction
  messages:
    welcomeMessage:
      origin: server
      body: root.WelcomePayload
      discriminant-values:
        - Welcome
    errorMessage:
      origin: server
      body: root.ErrorPayload
      discriminant-values:
        - Error
    dataMessage:
      origin: server
      body: root.DataPayload
      discriminant-values:
        - DataUpdate
        - DataRefresh
    plainMessage:
      origin: client
      body: root.PlainPayload
  examples:
    - messages:
        - type: plainMessage
          body: {}
        - type: welcomeMessage
          body: {}
imports:
  root: __package__.yml

rootApiFile.rawContents:
name: api
error-discrimination:
  strategy: status-code
environments:
  production: wss://api.example.com
default-environment: production
default-url: Base
